name: hyperbrief
description: Decision-delegation gating discipline. Wraps Hyperbrief.md v0.4.2 as 3 model-invoked skills (trigger-check + hyperbrief + revisit) + IR schema + 2 templates + Phase 2 deterministic renderers (mini-engine.cjs + types.d.ts + bin/render.cjs + ajv) + Phase 2 MCP server exposing 4 tools (hyperbrief_render / hyperbrief_validate / decision_ledger_append / decision_ledger_query). PreToolUse hook (decision-keyword detection auto-triggers rubric) deferred to v0.5. 결정 위임 게이팅 규율: 사용자에게 결정을 묻는 행위 자체를 규율한다.
